extension.summary: Configurable media provider framework for Kodi add-ons.
extension.description: Reusable Python module for legal, user-configured media provider integrations in Kodi add-ons. Provides provider registry, filtering, normalization, retry hooks, lifecycle helpers, and support utilities.
extension.disclaimer: Use only with sources you own, have permission to access, or that are publicly licensed. This module does not bypass DRM, paywalls, or access controls.
extension.news: Add disabled-by-default TorBox/TB Torznab provider with Magneto-compatible settings aliases.

extension.summary: Program launcher for AetherScraper settings and support tools.
extension.description: Visible Program add-on companion for script.module.aetherscraper. Opens module settings, provider summaries, safe provider actions, external setup help, and diagnostics without duplicating core code.
extension.disclaimer: Use only with sources you own, have permission to access, or that are publicly licensed. This add-on does not bypass DRM, paywalls, or access controls.
extension.news: Updated AetherScraper icon with a transparent background and scraper-focused branding.
